name: e2e-v2-continuation-auto
description: Run a v2 continuation stage that launches a linked child run automatically.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_PARENT_SOURCE and do not inspect or modify files.

Reply exactly {"summary":"E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_PARENT","nextFlowSpec":{"schemaVersion":2,"name":"e2e-v2-continuation-child","agent":"scout","readOnly":true,"tools":["read","grep","find","ls"],"flow":{"stages":[{"id":"child","type":"task","prompt":"Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUATION_CHILD_OK and do not inspect or modify files."}]}}} and do not inspect or modify files.
